mapper.select: SELECT id, group_name, primary_keyword, synonyms, category, confidence_base, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM keyword_groups WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY group_name

SELECT id, group_name, primary_keyword, synonyms, category, confidence_base, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM keyword_groups WHERE is_active = true AND category = #{category} ORDER BY group_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO keyword_groups (group_name, primary_keyword, synonyms, category, confidence_base, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{primaryKeyword}, #{synonyms}, #{category}, #{confidenceBase}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE keyword_groups SET group_name = #{groupName}, primary_keyword = #{primaryKeyword}, synonyms = #{synonyms}, category = #{category}, confidence_base = #{confidenceBase}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
